data.title: Upbound Group (NASDAQ: UPBD) beat estimated earnings by 4.12%, reporting EPS of $1.01 versus $0.97. Revenue increased by $117.00 million.
data.description: Upbound Group (NASDAQ: UPBD) announced its Q4 earnings on Thursday, February 19, 2026 at 07:00 AM. Key details from the earnings report reveal that Upbound Group surpassed estimated earnings by 4.12%, posting an EPS of $1.01 compared to the expected $0.97. Furthermore, the revenue saw an impressive increase of $117.00 million from the same quarter in the previous year. In the prior quarter, the company exceeded EPS projections by $0.02, leading to a subsequent 0.21% rise in the shares. For the comprehensive story, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Architect Frank Gehry disregarded norms to create innovative designs. His father doubted his success. (Total characters: 115)
data.description: The father of Gehry once mentioned that he was a dreamer lacking business acumen and predicted he would not succeed. Gehry revolutionized building design by breaking conventions, as per a report by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Kane Biotech expands in US with distribution deals for revyve Antimicrobial Wound Gel product line with companies in Texas and New Jersey.
data.description: Kane Biotech Inc., based in Winnipeg, Manitoba, made an announcement on Feb. 19, 2026, regarding its latest business endeavors. The company disclosed that it has officially penned non-exclusive distribution and sales contracts for its revyve® Antimicrobial Wound Gel® assortment. This agreement encompasses partnerships with Patient Care Medical from Austin, TX, and Life Biologics headquartered in Lakewood, NJ. This strategic move marks a significant step for Kane Biotech, leveraging the extensive reach of these partners to introduce its innovative medical product to a wider audience. This initiative is expected to propel the exposure and availability of the revyve® Antimicrobial Wound Gel® line, enhancing its market penetration and potentially boosting company revenue.

data.title: Synthetik to support Amentum in UK hypersonics mission with engineering expertise. Providing hypersonic modeling and simulation.
data.description: Synthetik Applied Technologies UK has been chosen to aid Amentum as the Industry Mission Partner (IMP) for TeamHx UK, supporting the MOD in establishing a UK hypersonics capability. This innovative partnership marks an MOD first in the approach to tackle a national technology challenge. Synthetik will contribute expertise in hypersonic modeling and simulation, digital integration, and knowledge-hub support to enhance MOD's delivery.

data.title: Trump claims 78% drop in US trade deficit due to tariffs, hopes for surplus soon. Official trade data to be released on Feb 19.
data.description: President Donald Trump asserted that his administration's strong tariff measures have led to a significant 78% drop in the U.S. trade deficit, with plans for the country to potentially reach its first trade surplus in years. In a message posted on Truth Social, Trump highlighted the effectiveness of his global "reciprocal tariffs" enforced on more than 100 countries since April 2025. He credited the decrease directly to these tariffs, emphasizing that the U.S. trade deficit has shrunk by 78% due to the charged duties. Trump optimistically mentioned the likelihood of the trade balance turning positive sometime this year, representing a substantial shift in trade policy. The President's speech anticipates the official release of December trade data on Feb. 19. Supporters see this potential transformation as a form of validation for the administration's trade strategies.

data.title: LKQ's Q4 earnings reveal a -9.23% miss in EPS at $0.59 (vs $0.65 est.) and a $45M revenue drop YoY. Company beat EPS by $0.09 in the previous quarter.
data.description: LKQ (NASDAQ: LKQ) released its Q4 earnings report on February 19, 2026, at 07:00 AM. The report showed that the company missed estimated earnings by -9.23%, with an EPS of $0.59 compared to the estimated $0.65. Additionally, revenue was down by $45.00 million from the previous year. In the last quarter, LKQ had exceeded EPS expectations by $0.09, resulting in a 2.57% increase. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. to discuss Q4 and full-year 2025 results on March 19, 2026 in a webcast with CEO Luis Raganato.
data.description: Montevideo, Uruguay - Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO) has announced a webcast to review its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ending December 31, 2025. The report will be disclosed before markets open on Thursday, March 19, 2026. Led by CEO Luis Raganato, senior management will conduct the webcast featuring opening statements and a Q&A session. The event welcomes participation from investors and will be accessible via Google Chrome.

data.description: Endava plc (NYSE: DAVA) shared their financial results for the three months ending on December 31, 2025 ("Q2 FY2026"). The technology-driven business transformation group highlighted their focus on becoming an AI leader by combining advanced technology with industry knowledge. They emphasized significant investments made in this direction, including recruitment and training of NextGen Ta.

data.title: Leo expands services with investments in Bevara Building Services and Blackfin, boosting national presence.
data.description: Leo, a network of expert facilities management service providers based in Pewaukee, Wisconsin, has recently formed partnerships with Bevara Building Services and Blackfin. Founded in 1996, Bevara is known for its dedicated on-site building engineers. Leo aims to expand its national facility service business by collaborating with top companies like Bevara and Blackfin, providing the necessary resources to drive their growth. The partnership signifies Leo's commitment to enhancing their services and expanding their reach in the industry.

data.title: Cushman & Wakefield reports strong financial results for 2025, with 34% EPS growth, $125M cash flow improvement, and $300M debt repayment.
data.description: In New York, Cushman & Wakefield Ltd. (NYSE: CWK) shared their financial performance for the last quarter and full year of 2025. CEO Michelle MacKay highlighted their achievements, noting a remarkable 34% growth in adjusted earnings per share. The company also saw a significant increase in cash flow exceeding $125 million and managed to reduce debt by prepaying $300 million. MacKay emphasized the positive state of commercial real estate markets, indicating strong market conditions.

data.title: Appian's Q4 earnings beat estimates by 400%, with EPS at $0.15. Revenue up by $36.18 million from last year.
data.description: On Thursday, February 19, 2026, at 07:05 AM, Appian (NASDAQ: APPN) released its Q4 earnings results. The company exceeded estimated earnings by 400.0%, posting an EPS of $0.15 compared to the expected $0.03. Revenue saw a significant increase, rising by $36.18 million from the previous year. This performance marks a positive trend as Appian continues to outperform projected financial figures. For further details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: First Majestic Silver Q4 earnings report released; EPS $0.22 missed estimates by -12%, revenue up $160.38M.
data.description: On Thursday, February 19, 2026, First Majestic Silver (NYSE: AG) released its Q4 earnings report at 07:00 AM. However, there was a notable increase in revenue, which reached $160.38 million higher than the corresponding period last year. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
